scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs');function rm(p){if(!fs.existsSync(p))return;for(let i=0;i<5;i++){try{fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true,maxRetries:3,retryDelay:200});return}catch(e){if(i===4)throw e}}}for(const d of ['dist','.astro','node_modules/.vite','.astro-build.lock'])rm(d);console.log('cleared dist + .astro + node_modules/.vite')"
scripts.dev:clean: npm run clean && npm run dev
scripts.build:fast:clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs');for(const d of ['dist','.astro','node_modules/.vite'])fs.rmSync(d,{recursive:true,force:true})" && astro build
